name: Texas Mineral Resources Corp.
summary: Texas Mineral Resources Corp. (TMRC) is an exploration-stage company focused on rare earth elements (REE) and other critical minerals. Its primary asset is an 18.715% membership interest in Round Top Mountain Development, LLC (RTMD), which owns the Round Top Project—a 950-acre rare earths exploration and development project in Hudspeth County, Texas. The company also pursues potential joint ventures with Santa Fe and Steeple Rock for additional mineral exploration.

products.name: Round Top Project
products.description: A 950-acre rare earth elements exploration and development project in Hudspeth County, Texas, owned by RTMD.

partnerships.description: TMRC holds an 18.715% membership interest in RTMD, which owns and operates the Round Top Project.
Potential joint venture arrangement for exploration and development; details not finalized as of filing.
Potential mining venture arrangement; details not finalized as of filing.
